constraints.description: Optimize workflow steps without introducing unnecessary product surface area
constraints.rationale: Workflow changes should streamline execution rather than expand the feature set
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the resulting flow to confirm the simplification stays bounded

constraints.description: Preserve compatibility guarantees with existing systems and interfaces
constraints.rationale: The feature must not break current integrations or established behavior
constraints.verificationMethod: Validate existing callers and integration tests continue to pass unchanged

inScope: Address the stated problem: 修复痛点
outOfScope: Large product-surface expansion beyond workflow optimization

acceptanceCriteria.description: brainstorm-context-packet addresses the stated problem: 修复痛点
brainstorm-context-packet respects the stated constraint: 兼容现有系统

nonGoals: Broad product expansion outside the workflow itself
testingStrategy: Use targeted tests and review to verify: 兼容现有系统
